_comment: Example ~/.claude/settings.json for use with ccbar. Only `statusLine` is required; modelContextWindow and modelPricing are OPTIONAL overrides — ccbar ships sensible Claude defaults already.

modelContextWindow._comment: Optional: context window size per model (in tokens). Claude models default to 200000.

modelPricing._comment: Optional: price per 1M tokens. Claude official USD pricing shown. Use currency CNY for GLM etc. (see README).
